scope: Individual and HUF taxpayers under old tax regime only.
source_name: Income Tax Department, Government of India
notes: Limits unchanged in Budget 2026-27. Deduction for health insurance premiums paid for self, spouse, dependent children, and parents. Preventive health check-up sub-limit included within overall cap. Not available under new regime.

data.notes: Max if self+family senior AND parents senior = Rs 50,000 + Rs 50,000 = Rs 1,00,000. Preventive check-up sub-limit of Rs 5,000 is within the respective cap, not additional.
